bindings.title: Central Watchpost Idol
bindings.excerpt: The central idol anchors the whole page in Tung Tung Tung Sahur as a sensory folklore object rather than a generic meme mascot.
bindings.source_title: Tung Tung Tung Sahur’s sensonarrative power
bindings.source_summary: A deep essay on how Tung Tung Tung Sahur turns an Indonesian wake-up signal into global algorithmic folklore and commentary culture.
bindings.source_image_alt: Screenshot of the Algorithmic Folklore Substack essay

bindings.title: Ranking Board
bindings.excerpt: The board opens into a parallel case of viral sonic signal spreading far beyond its local origin.
bindings.source_summary: Norient examines how viral signal-like sounds travel through online ecologies, giving the watchpost a broader global commentary lane.
bindings.source_image_alt: Screenshot of the Norient viral horn article

bindings.title: Map Route Board
bindings.excerpt: The route board ties the watchpost back to the real cultural temporality of sahur and pre-dawn communal movement.
bindings.source_summary: Background on the pre-dawn Ramadan meal and the temporal/social context that Tung Tung Tung Sahur indexes.
bindings.source_image_alt: Screenshot of the Suhur Wikipedia page

bindings.title: CCTV Monitor
bindings.excerpt: The monitor pocket turns from village watchfulness toward another famous sensory-media panic event: Pokémon Shock.
bindings.source_summary: The Pokémon Shock incident gives the watchpost a direct media-panic and sensory-threshold counterpart.
bindings.source_image_alt: Screenshot of the Dennō Senshi Porygon Wikipedia page

bindings.title: Comment Notes Board
bindings.excerpt: The notes board widens into the question of how sensory triggers spread from atmosphere into real bodily response.
bindings.source_summary: A reference page on the neurological sensitivity that turns flashing media into a genuine bodily threshold event.
bindings.source_image_alt: Screenshot of the Photosensitive epilepsy Wikipedia page

bindings.title: Social Clip Cards
bindings.excerpt: The card trio now opens straight into the broader genre ecology that made these absurd entities spread across feeds so fast.
bindings.source_summary: A reference page on the meme genre that contextualizes the character’s spread beyond Indonesia.
bindings.source_image_alt: Screenshot of the Italian brainrot Wikipedia page

bindings.title: Archive & Spread Cabinet
bindings.excerpt: The cabinet widens the watchpost into stylized audiovisual intensity, using Hard Boiled as a parallel case of sensory escalation.
bindings.source_summary: Criterion’s framing of Hard Boiled as violence-as-poetry gives the scene a filmic branch of panic, rhythm, and escalation.
bindings.source_image_alt: Screenshot of the Criterion Hard Boiled page

bindings.title: Signal + Alert Console
bindings.excerpt: The alert console now points to the cascade where media-triggered fear, contagion, and bodily reaction become social amplification.
bindings.source_summary: A reference page on socially contagious symptoms and panic, giving the watchpost a distinct collective-response lane.
bindings.source_image_alt: Screenshot of the Mass psychogenic illness Wikipedia page
